case_title: THE REGENTS OF UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA/SEDGWICK VS. LILIAN OLBES RIVERA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, LILIAN OLBES

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,694.58 FILED BY THE REGENTS OF UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA/SEDGWICK CMS 2010102796 AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, LILIAN OLBES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-11-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE REGENTS OF UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA/SEDGWICK CMS 2010102796

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, LILIAN OLBES
